title: Death Bundles
description: Despawning items is the least fun part of Minecraft, make em stick around in a compact bundle!
body:
When you die, all of your items are transferred to an indestructible bundle (I'll add configuration eventually)

I'd add images, but its literally just a bundle, nothing special about it

### Known issues
- Death Bundles in Creative mode are buggy (without mod installed on client)
